"'''Kyle Katarn's Tale'''" is a set of scenarios for the [[Star Wars Miniatures]] game, written by [[Abel G. Peña]] and [[Jason Fry]]. They were published on the [[Wizards of the Coast]] website April - May [[2005]]. They served as a companion piece to [[The Dark Forces Saga]] series.
